title: Intelligent Energy Metering Process Flow
description: A flowchart illustrating the continuous cycle of how intelligent energy metering systems collect, analyze, and act on data to improve energy efficiency in an IT environment.
relationships: Sensors measure energy usage and send data to the Gateway
Gateway aggregates and transmits data to the Analytics software
Analytics software processes data to identify trends and inefficiencies
Insights are displayed on the Management Dashboard for decision-making
Automated systems receive commands to optimize energy consumption
